message:
Merge PR #2754: fix: add exponential backoff to convoy event poller on Dolt errors

Add exponential backoff with max 60s ceiling to convoy event poller when
Dolt queries fail, preventing hammering a recovering server.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2754
Author: DreadPirateRobertz

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
